contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: You can reach Anadolu Hospitals Group using the contact information below.
contactPage.phoneDesc: You can reach us through our call center which serves 7/24.
contactPage.emailDesc: You can write to our email address for your questions and suggestions.
contactPage.workingHoursDesc: Our hospitals serve during the following hours.
contactPage.writeUsDesc: You can reach us by filling out the form below for your questions, suggestions or complaints. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contactPage.faq1q: How can I make an appointment?
contactPage.faq1a: You can make an appointment online through our website or by calling our call center at 444 50 58.
contactPage.faq2q: Which insurance companies do you have agreements with?
contactPage.faq2a: We have agreements with many private health insurance companies and SGK. You can call our call center for a detailed list.
contactPage.faq3q: Can I get information about your check-up packages?
contactPage.faq3a: We have various check-up packages for different age groups and needs. You can visit our website for detailed information.
contactPage.faq4q: Do you have parking services at your hospitals?
contactPage.faq4a: Yes, we offer free parking services for our patients at all our hospitals.
contactPage.faq5q: What are the patient visiting hours?
contactPage.faq5a: Patient visiting hours are between 14:00-16:00 and 19:00-20:00 every day.

doctorsPage.title: Our Doctors

healthTourismPage.contactDesc: Contact us for more information about health tourism.
healthTourismPage.contactInfoDesc: To get more information about health tourism, learn about treatment options or book an appointment, you can contact us. Our expert team will get back to you as soon as possible.

home.ctaText: Make an appointment with our expert doctors and prioritize your health. With our online appointment system, you can complete your transaction in just a few minutes.
home.departmentsSubtitle: We are at your service for your health with our expert doctors and state-of-the-art equipment.
home.doctorsSubtitle: Your health is in safe hands with our expert and experienced physicians.
home.guideSubtitle: Healthy living tips, information about diseases and expert opinions.
home.serviceMultilingualDesc: Services in English, German, Arabic, Russian and many more languages.
home.serviceAccommodationDesc: Support for your accommodation needs during your treatment process.
home.serviceExpertDoctorsDesc: We are at your service with our doctors with international experience.
home.serviceModernTechDesc: The latest technology medical devices and treatment methods.
home.serviceCompanionDesc: Special support for you and your companion during your treatment process.
home.healthTourismSubtitle: Turkey's leading healthcare institution for world-class health services.
home.healthTourismText: As Anadolu Hospitals Group, we provide the highest quality healthcare services to patients from all over the world. With our modern technology, expert doctor staff and internationally standard facilities, we are here for your health.
home.heroSubtitle1: With our quarter-century of experience, world-class technology and over 150 expert staff, we shape the future of your health.
home.heroSubtitle2: With Joint Commission International accreditation, we are at the peak in international standards, patient safety and quality management.
home.heroSubtitle3: With our advanced emergency intervention units and experienced staff, we are ready to save lives at any hour of the night.
home.hospitalsSubtitle: In different regions of Istanbul, with the same quality and care.
home.testimonial1Text: All doctors and nurses were very attentive during my surgery at Anadolu Hospital. I am grateful for the professional approach and warm interest.
home.testimonial2Text: The service we received at Anadolu Children's Hospital for my child's treatment was excellent. Our patient and understanding doctors reassured us very much.
home.testimonial3Text: I had a check-up. The entire process progressed very quickly and professionally. I was able to get my results on the same day and my doctor explained them in detail.
home.testimonial4Text: I was treated for a heart condition. He and his team were very attentive and professional. I feel much better now.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Our patients' experiences and satisfaction are very valuable to us.

profile.noAppointments: You do not have any appointments yet.
profile.avatarUploadError: An error occurred while uploading avatar.

profile.metaDescription: Anadolu Hospitals Group user profile page. Update your profile information and view your appointments.

aboutHospital.metaDescription: Anadolu Hospital is an experienced healthcare institution that has been serving the regional people with quality healthcare since 1991.
aboutHospital.p1b: . Anadolu Hospital, which has adopted the principle of meeting the health needs of the region and providing quality health services to the people of the region, aims to become a preferred brand in its region with its experienced health staff.
aboutHospital.p2a: Patients and their relatives will receive
aboutHospital.p2b: from the first moment they step into our hospital until they leave our hospital, and they will feel the warmth of their families.

about.milestone2010Desc: We certified our quality with JCI Accreditation.
about.value1Desc: We listen to each patient's story and offer personalized solutions.
about.value2Desc: Transparency and ethical values are our most fundamental working principles.
about.value3Desc: We instantly integrate the latest developments in medical technology into our system.
about.ctaDesc: We touch thousands of lives every day with the most advanced medical technologies and our compassionate perspective. Experience the Anadolu Hospitals difference.

login.errorInvalid: Invalid login credentials. Please try again.
login.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.

chairman.milestone2003: Çorlu Millet Hospital was put into service.
chairman.milestone2007: Karadeniz Ereğli Anadolu Hospital was opened.
chairman.heroSubtitle: Dr. Hayati ARKAZ — Chairman of the Board
chairman.name: Dr. Hayati ARKAZ
chairman.title: Chairman of the Board
chairman.bio2: Graduated from Istanbul Faculty of Medicine
chairman.quote: Living healthy and equally benefiting from health services is everyone's most fundamental right.
chairman.p2a: As Anadolu Hospitals Group, the basis of our management philosophy is formed by
chairman.p3a: All hospitals under Anadolu Hospitals Group; with expert doctor staff, experienced health personnel and advanced technological medical devices
chairman.p4a: Dr. Hayati ARKAZ was born in Sivas / Yıldızeli on 25.03.1957.

companion.pageSubtitle: For the safety of our inpatients and their relatives at our hospitals
companion.policyDesc: As Anadolu Hospitals, without disrupting the service flow, within the means of our hospital and to the extent required by the patient's health condition, within the appropriate time and method, by setting certain rules, by ensuring the support and participation of the patient's relatives to meet the medical care and psychosocial needs of our inpatients, we aim to increase our corporate image and provide quality health service.
companion.whoNotTitle: Who Should Not Be a Companion?
companion.whoNot2: Those with complaints such as fever, cough, sputum,
companion.whoNot3: Those with an infectious disease or predisposition to infection,
companion.whoNot5: Those with any chronic disease should not be companions.
companion.ruleSmokingDesc: Smoking and tobacco products are not allowed inside the hospital building.
companion.ruleNoiseDesc: Do not speak loudly and make noise inside the hospital building.
companion.ruleHygieneDesc: Companions must absolutely comply with hand hygiene rules.
companion.ruleFoodDesc: Food/beverages should not be brought from outside and should not be given to the patient without consulting the doctor/nurse.
companion.ruleLimitDesc: The number of companions is limited to 1 (one) person except in special circumstances.
companion.ruleVisitDesc: Companions should leave patient rooms during doctor visit hours.
companion.mealNote: Only our registered companion can benefit from the meal service free of charge.

complaint.channelSurveyDesc: You can fill out the survey forms located on the floors and in waiting halls.
complaint.channelFaceDesc: You can request a face-to-face meeting with the Patient Relations Department officials.
complaint.channelPhoneDesc: You can have a phone conversation with the Patient Relations Department.
complaint.channelMailDesc: You can send your opinions and suggestions by letter to our postal address.
complaint.channelEmailDesc: You can write to hastahaklari@anadoluhastaneleri.com via electronic mail.
complaint.step1Desc: The Patient Relations Department records all opinions, suggestions and complaints conveyed and informs the applicant.
complaint.step2Desc: The reported opinions are evaluated and examined together with the relevant department managers.
complaint.step3Desc: Solution-oriented decisions are taken with the participation of our senior managers and put into practice.
complaint.step4Desc: Feedback is given to the applicant regarding the evaluation results and decisions taken.
complaint.metaDescription: Anadolu Hospitals Group complaint management policy and patient relations processes.
complaint.subtitle: We take your opinions seriously and work to continuously improve our service quality.
complaint.processDesc: We transparently share how your complaints and opinions are handled.

deptDetail.step1Desc: The patient's complaints are listened to, physical examination is performed and necessary tests are requested.
deptDetail.step2Desc: A definitive diagnosis is made by evaluating laboratory and imaging results.
deptDetail.step3Desc: A multidisciplinary treatment strategy specific to the patient is determined.
deptDetail.step4Desc: Treatment is safely applied with modern devices and expert staff.
deptDetail.step5Desc: The process is completed with regular checks and support programs after treatment.
deptDetail.notFoundDesc: The department you are looking for could not be found. Please view all our departments.
deptDetail.noDoctors: There are no doctors in this department yet.

deptDesc.acilServis: 7/24 uninterrupted emergency health service with instant intervention by our specialist physicians in our modern emergency service.
deptDesc.agizDis: Aesthetic and treatment-oriented oral-dental health services in our modern dental units.
deptDesc.algoloji: We improve your quality of life with chronic pain management and pain injections.
deptDesc.anestezi: Safe anesthesia applications before, during and after surgery.
deptDesc.beslenme: Healthy living with individual nutrition plans and diet counseling.
deptDesc.beyinCerrahi: Advanced technology and expert staff in brain and spinal cord surgery.
deptDesc.biyokimya: Strong support for diagnostic processes with precise laboratory analyses.
deptDesc.checkup: Comprehensive health screening packages for early diagnosis.
deptDesc.cocukCerrahi: Minimal invasive surgical solutions specially for children.
deptDesc.cocukKardiyoloji: Expert pediatric heart health from congenital heart diseases to rhythm disorders.
deptDesc.cocukSagligi: Growth and development follow-up and treatment of childhood diseases for ages 0-18.
deptDesc.cocukRuhSagligi: Child and adolescent mental health, behavioral disorders and therapy.
deptDesc.dermatoloji: Skin health, aesthetic dermatology and laser treatments.
deptDesc.diyabet: Multidisciplinary approach in diabetes diagnosis, treatment and follow-up.
deptDesc.elMikro: Hand and wrist surgery, microsurgery and nerve repair.
deptDesc.endokrinoloji: Hormone disorders, thyroid and metabolism diseases.
deptDesc.enfeksiyon: Infection diagnosis and treatment, vaccination counseling.
deptDesc.fizikTedavi: Musculoskeletal and neurological rehabilitation specialist team.
deptDesc.gastroenteroloji: Endoscopy and colonoscopy services in digestive system diseases.
deptDesc.genelCerrahi: Safe operations with laparoscopic and open surgical methods.
deptDesc.girisimselRadyoloji: Minimal invasive interventional procedures under imaging guidance.
deptDesc.gogus: Diagnosis and treatment of asthma, COPD, lung cancer and sleep apnea.
deptDesc.goz: Cataract, glaucoma, laser and retina surgery services.
deptDesc.icHastaliklari: Experienced staff in internal diseases diagnosis and treatment.
deptDesc.kadinHastaliklari: Gynecological surgery, obstetrics and IVF services.
deptDesc.kalpDamarCerrahi: Coronary bypass, valve surgery and vascular interventions.
deptDesc.kbb: Sinusitis, hearing loss and ENT surgery services.
deptDesc.medikalEstetik: Botox, fillers, mesotherapy and skin rejuvenation applications.
deptDesc.nefroloji: Kidney diseases, dialysis and hypertension treatment.
deptDesc.noroloji: Diagnosis and treatment of brain, nerve and muscle diseases.
deptDesc.ortodonti: Braces treatment, clear aligners and jaw orthopedics.
deptDesc.ortopedi: Bone fractures, joint prosthesis and sports injuries.
deptDesc.patoloji: Definitive diagnosis with biopsy and cytology examinations.
deptDesc.psikoloji: Individual, family and couple therapy services.
deptDesc.radyoloji: MRI, CT, ultrasound and mammography imaging services.
deptDesc.uroloji: Kidney stones, prostate and urinary tract diseases.
deptDesc.yenidoganYogunBakim: Intensive care for premature and risky babies.

departments.subtitle: As Anadolu Hospitals Group, we serve for your health with our expert doctors and modern technology.

doctorDetail.aboutDesc: {{name}} works in the {{dept}} department at {{hospital}}. By using modern diagnosis and treatment methods, they provide the most up-to-date and effective health service to their patients.
doctorDetail.deptDescTemplate: In our {{deptName}} department, we aim to provide the best health service to our patients with our expert physician staff and modern medical technologies. By adopting a multidisciplinary approach in diagnostic and treatment processes, we produce personalized solutions for each of our patients.
doctorDetail.metaDesc: {{name}} - {{title}}. Find information about our specialist doctor serving at {{hospital}} and book an online appointment.

gebe.featureExpertDesc: Information with our experienced team consisting of gynecologists, midwives and dietitians.
gebe.featureWorkshopDesc: Practical birth preparation and baby care workshops in addition to theoretical knowledge.
gebe.featureFamilyDesc: Preparation process within family integrity with seminars attended by spouses.
gebe.featureFreeCheckDesc: Free doctor consultation and check-up opportunity after the seminar.
gebe.title: Prenatal School
gebe.seminarsSubtitle: Highlights from the training and workshops we conduct at our prenatal school
gebe.ctaDesc: Register for our seminars to have a healthy pregnancy process with our expert staff. All our seminars are free.

mission.values1Desc: It is aimed to ensure the safety of our patients and employees at the highest level in all service processes. Patient care processes are optimized with risk management and continuous improvement culture.
mission.values2Title: Ethics and Respect for Patient Rights
mission.values2Desc: By providing services in accordance with medical ethics and patient rights, a fair and egalitarian healthcare understanding is adopted.
mission.values3Desc: Healthcare services are provided under the leadership of scientific and technological developments by adopting evidence-based medicine practices.
mission.values4Desc: Service quality is continuously improved by measuring, evaluating patient satisfaction and carrying out improvement activities.
mission.values5Desc: All our employees are encouraged to actively contribute to processes with a participatory management understanding. Effective and efficient healthcare service understanding is adopted with multidisciplinary collaboration.
mission.values6Desc: It is aimed to act in accordance with waste management, energy efficiency and environmental sustainability principles. Social responsibility awareness is adopted by developing projects to increase public health awareness.
mission.metaDescription: Corporate mission, vision and core values of Anadolu Hospitals Group.
mission.visionTitle: To Be a Reliable Leader in Healthcare
mission.missionDesc: To provide accessible, ethical, patient and employee satisfaction-oriented, contemporary, modern and compassionate healthcare services to all segments of society.
mission.valuesDesc: Our core values that guide us at every stage of our corporate processes.

notFound.metaDescription: The page you are looking for could not be found. Click to return to the homepage.

notFound.description: The page you are looking for could not be found or may have been moved. Please return to the homepage or use the links below.

feedback.contactDesc: Our patient relations team is always ready to help you with a smiling service approach.

patientInfo.doc5Desc: Rehabilitation process for patients who have undergone heart surgery

patientInfo.note1: These documents are for general information purposes
patientInfo.note2: Consult your doctor for your personal treatment plan
patientInfo.note4: Contact our hospital staff for your questions
patientInfo.docNote1: Review the documents with your doctor
patientInfo.docNote2: Be sure to ask about parts you don't understand
patientInfo.docNote3: Use documents appropriate for your treatment plan
patientInfo.docNote4: Make an appointment for regular check-ups
patientInfo.ctaDesc: Get an appointment from our expert doctors for detailed information about your health condition

patientRights.right1Desc: Within the framework of Justice and Equity principles, you have the right to benefit from health services regardless of language, religion, race, gender and social status.
patientRights.right2Desc: You have the right to learn about all services and opportunities offered at our hospital and to receive any oral or written information about your health condition.
patientRights.right3Desc: You have the right to choose and change the health institution, to learn the identities and duties of the doctors and health workers who serve you, and to choose and change your doctor.
patientRights.right4Desc: You have the right to receive health services in an environment where privacy rules are respected and privacy is respected.
patientRights.right5Desc: You have the right to have your consent obtained for medical interventions, to refuse the applied treatment or to request its cessation.
patientRights.right6Title: Security and Respect for Human Values
patientRights.right6Desc: You have the right to receive treatment in a safe, clean, noise-free, smiling and kind environment and to fulfill your religious duties in accordance with your beliefs.
patientRights.pageSubtitle: Your health, your rights. We are here for your safe treatment process.
patientRights.rightsTitle: Your Rights Are Under Our Guarantee
patientRights.rightsDesc: Patient rights are the most basic part of the right to a healthy life. Being healthy and staying healthy are among the most fundamental inalienable rights of people from birth. As Anadolu Hospitals, we attach great importance to all the rights you have during your treatment process and shape our services with this awareness.
patientRights.responsibilitiesDesc: For your treatment to yield the best results, you should not forget that you are also a participating part of the treatment team. The quality of the service provided is directly proportional to your compliance.
patientRights.resp1: To act in accordance with the rules and practices of the health institution you apply to.
patientRights.resp2: To fully and accurately convey to your doctor the medications you use, previous treatments and your complaints.
patientRights.resp3: To come for check-ups at the times determined by the physician and to inform the institution in a timely manner about appointment cancellations.
patientRights.resp4: To respect the rights of other patients, visitors and hospital staff.

cert.jciDesc: International quality certificate issued by Joint Commission International
cert.ministryDesc: Activity certificate issued by the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Turkey
cert.ministryIssuer: Ministry of Health of the Republic of Turkey
cert.pageSubtitle: Our certificates documenting our service quality at international standards
cert.certSubtitle: International documents we have received for patient safety and service quality
cert.standardsSubtitle: Standards we apply for patient safety and service quality
cert.safetyDesc: We apply international protocols to keep patient safety at the highest level.
cert.qualityDesc: We continuously improve our service quality with the principle of continuous improvement.
cert.accreditationDesc: We are regularly audited by international accreditation bodies.
cert.ctaDesc: Make an appointment at our hospitals that provide international standard service

quality.councilSafetyDesc: It is the committee that evaluates all safety incidents in our hospital, takes precautions and determines policies.
quality.councilInfectionDesc: It is the committee that ensures the prevention and follow-up of hospital infections and conducts surveillance studies.
quality.councilEthicsDesc: It is the committee that protects patient rights and evaluates ethical issues in accordance with medical ethical principles.
quality.councilQualityDesc: It is the committee that plans and monitors continuous improvement activities within the framework of HQS (Healthcare Quality Standards).
quality.councilMedicalDesc: It is the supreme council that makes decisions to increase the efficiency of medical processes and patient satisfaction.
quality.councilRiskDesc: It is the committee that identifies, evaluates corporate risks and develops strategies to reduce them.
quality.step1Desc: Determination of quality objectives and definition of standards.
quality.step2Desc: Implementation of determined procedures and protocols in all units.
quality.step3Desc: Monitoring the compliance of processes with HQS and ISO standards through internal audit.
quality.step4Desc: Initiation of corrective activities and evaluation of results in line with findings.
quality.metaDescription: Anadolu Hospitals Group quality management system, organization chart, committees and accreditation information.
quality.heroDesc: Our understanding of uninterrupted quality improvement in accordance with international standards and Ministry of Health legislation.
quality.orgDesc: The basic management levels of our quality management system are shown below.
quality.legislationDesc: Our documentation and standardization activities carried out within the framework of health legislation.
quality.bottomCta: At Your Service With Our Quality Understanding

testNew.heading: 🎉 Test Page is Working!
testNew.description: This page has been successfully created and is being displayed.

test.hardcodedDesc: The app is now using hard-coded Supabase configuration to bypass environment variable issues. This should resolve the CORS error you were experiencing.

visiting.pageSubtitle: Visit procedures at our hospitals and rules you need to follow
visiting.purposeTitle: What is the Purpose of Visiting?
visiting.purpose1: To meet the patient's needs that need to be provided from outside (clothing, etc.).
visiting.purpose2: To provide psychological support by asking about the patient's well-being.
visiting.purpose3: To contribute to the healing process by raising the patient's morale due to social solidarity.
visiting.normalHoursDesc: Visits are accepted every day at Anadolu Hospitals. Two different time periods have been determined as daytime and evening.
visiting.nightTitle: Why Shouldn't You Visit at Night?
visiting.nightDesc: The number of staff decreases at night. Night visits are prohibited because security, patient sleep and patient rights are negatively affected.
visiting.icuDesc: Visits in intensive care are made according to the patient's condition and the physician's decision. Usually, the visit duration is arranged not to exceed 5 minutes.
visiting.icuAdultDesc: Physician information every day between 13:00 - 14:00. Short visit after information on Monday, Wednesday, Friday.
visiting.icuKvcDesc: Information and then planned short visit between 12:00 - 13:30 on weekdays.
visiting.icuNewbornDesc: Information between 11:30 - 12:30 every day. Visit is held on days deemed appropriate by the physician.
visiting.whoNotVisit2: Those with complaints such as fever, cough, sneezing and sputum
visiting.whoNotVisit3: Patients with a known infectious disease
visiting.whoNotVisit5: People with weak immune systems (prone to infection)
visiting.rule1: The visit duration should be short (preferably no more than 10 minutes).
visiting.rule2: There should be no more than two visitors per patient and no loud speaking.
visiting.rule3: Do not bring food when visiting and do not give food to other patients in the same room.
visiting.rule4: Do not sit on patient beds.
visiting.rule5: Rooms should be left without waiting for the staff's warning at the end of visiting hours.
